title_summary: Aggregate failure: test pagination behavior (18/18 scenario checks failed)
description: The test-pagination-behavior check failed in aggregate against http://localhost:8899: [api-tester-test-pagination-behavior] quality outcome=FAIL; metric=0.0. The per-scenario evidence is in TestCases/test-pagination-behavior/cases.json. There is no single reproducible API call — reproduce it with the script described in the steps below (which is also why this bug has no Postman section).
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Start the target API at http://localhost:8899.
2. Write a script that calls GET http://localhost:8899/products?limit=10&skip=0 and then ?limit=10&skip=10 (repeat for /users and /posts).
3. Assert each page returns exactly `limit` items, the two pages share no ids, `total` is identical across pages, and `skip`/`limit` are echoed correctly.
4. Compare your script's failures with the per-scenario evidence in TestCases/test-pagination-behavior/cases.json — this run recorded 18 of 18 checks failing.
expected_result: Per the documentation (references/dummyjson-com/dummyjson-com-docs.md:27 — https://dummyjson.com/docs): "All the resources can be used with query params to achieve pagination and get limited data. `limit=0` clears the limit and you get all items." Every 'test pagination behavior' scenario check must conform to this.

documentation.text: All the resources can be used with query params to achieve pagination and get limited data. `limit=0` clears the limit and you get all items
documentation.reviewer_reason: The documentation (references/dummyjson-com/dummyjson-com-docs.md, most recent) specifies that pagination with `limit=0` must clear the limit and return all items. The observed test result shows all 18 pagination behavior scenario checks failed entirely (metric=0.0), indicating the API is not behaving as documented.

documented_expected: Per the documentation (references/dummyjson-com/dummyjson-com-docs.md:27 — https://dummyjson.com/docs): "All the resources can be used with query params to achieve pagination and get limited data. `limit=0` clears the limit and you get all items."
